channel.title: Tops on Joe Peskett
channel.description: Recent content in Tops on Joe Peskett

item.description: Hi, my name is Joe. I’m a machine learning / software engineer, working with Antiverse to help use machine learning in the discovery of new antibody therapies. I have a background in Neuroscience, with a particular interest in plasticity and learning. I have worked in the machine learning space for both public and private sector organisation, with experience in both the data science and engineering/infrastructure side of things.
